Landing.title: Manage Clients
Landing.subtitle: More Efficiently & Professionally
Landing.description: Booking management, invoicing, and WhatsApp confirmation system. Designed modern and minimalist for freelance vendors, photographers, videographers, and MUAs.
Landing.trustedBy: Trusted by vendors & freelancers in Indonesia
Landing.problemSubtitle: Do you experience these issues every day?
Landing.problem1Desc: Booking information spread across WhatsApp, notes, and different spreadsheets. Hard to track.
Landing.problem2Desc: Creating invoices one by one, calculating remaining balances, and tracking down payments manually.
Landing.problem3Desc: No centralized system to check schedules, leading to frequent double bookings.
Landing.problem4Desc: Not knowing which bookings are completed, unpaid, or still in the queue.
Landing.problem5Desc: Retyping booking confirmation messages to each client takes up your valuable time.
Landing.problem6Desc: No clear revenue summary, mixed-up down payments, and difficult to create financial reports.
Landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to manage vendor clients professionally
Landing.feature1Desc: Manage all client bookings in one dashboard. Add manually or import from Excel.
Landing.feature2Desc: Create professional invoices, track DP and payments, and monitor your revenue.
Landing.feature3Desc: Send booking confirmations, session reminders, and custom messages directly via WhatsApp.
Landing.feature4Desc: Sync booking schedules directly to Google Calendar. No need to re-enter.
Landing.feature5Desc: Automatically create work folders in Google Drive for each client booking.
Landing.feature6Desc: Share a booking form link to clients. Data automatically enters your dashboard.
Landing.workflowSubtitle: Three simple steps to start managing your clients
Landing.step1Desc: Create a free account, set up your vendor profile, and add your services/packages.
Landing.step2Desc: Clients fill in the online booking form, or you add them manually from the dashboard.
Landing.step3Desc: Manage schedules, send WA confirmations, create invoices, and monitor your finances.
Landing.pricingSubtitle: Starting from Rp 39,000/month. Small investment, big results for your business. Try free for 5 days!
Landing.faqSectionSubtitle: Answers to common questions about Client Desk
Landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Manage Clients More Professionally?
Landing.ctaSubtitle: Join now and experience the ease of managing bookings, invoices, and client schedules.
Landing.ctaTrialNote: No credit card needed. 5-day trial, then choose the right plan for you.

FAQ.pageDescription: Find answers to common questions about Client Desk here.
FAQ.a1: Client Desk is a client management platform designed specifically for freelance vendors such as photographers, videographers, and MUAs. Manage bookings, invoices, schedules, and WhatsApp communication in one dashboard.
FAQ.a2: Client Desk offers a free trial so you can try all features. After the trial, you can choose a subscription plan starting from Rp 39,000/month.
FAQ.a3: Client Desk is ideal for freelance vendors, photographers, videographers, MUAs, wedding organizers, and other service businesses that need a clean and professional client management system.
FAQ.a4: Yes, we use encryption and secure cloud infrastructure to protect your data. Data is stored on encrypted servers protected with industry-standard security measures.
FAQ.a5: Simply register an account, set up your vendor profile, add your services/packages, and you're ready to receive bookings from clients.
FAQ.q6: How much does Client Desk cost?
FAQ.a6: Client Desk is available starting from Rp 39,000/month, Rp 99,000/3 months, Rp 349,000/year, or Rp 549,000 for lifetime access.
FAQ.a7: We accept payment via bank transfer, e-wallets (GoPay, OVO, Dana), and QRIS.
FAQ.a8: Yes, we offer a 7-day money-back guarantee after purchase if you feel Client Desk doesn't meet your needs.
FAQ.q9: What are the main features of Client Desk?
FAQ.a9: Key features include booking management, invoicing & finance, WhatsApp integration, Google Calendar sync, auto Google Drive, online booking forms, team management, and more.
FAQ.q10: Does Client Desk support multiple languages?
FAQ.a10: Yes, Client Desk supports Bahasa Indonesia and English. You can switch languages at any time.
FAQ.q11: Can I access it from my phone?
FAQ.a11: Yes, Client Desk is fully responsive and can be accessed from your phone, tablet, or desktop browser.
FAQ.q12: Do I need to install an app?
FAQ.a12: No, Client Desk is a web application that runs in your browser. Just open the website and log in, no installation needed.

Pricing.pageDescription: Affordable pricing for all vendors. Small investment, big results for your business.
Pricing.trialDescription: Enjoy a 5-day free trial to try all Client Desk features without limitations.

Features.pageDescription: Manage clients, bookings, invoices, and vendor schedules in one modern platform.
Features.feature1Desc: Manage all client bookings in one dashboard. Add manually or bulk import from Excel.
Features.feature2Desc: Create professional invoices, track DP and payments, and monitor revenue in real-time.
Features.feature3Desc: Send booking confirmations, session reminders, and custom messages directly via WhatsApp with one click.
Features.feature4Desc: Sync booking schedules directly to Google Calendar. Your schedule is always up-to-date.
Features.feature5Desc: Sync and manage work folders in Google Drive for each client booking.
Features.feature6Desc: Share a booking form link with clients. Data automatically enters your dashboard.
Features.feature7Desc: Manage team members and freelancers. Assign work to photographers, videographers, or MUAs.
Features.feature8Desc: Track every booking's progress from pending to complete. Clients can also check their status.
Features.feature9Desc: Bulk import booking data from Excel or CSV files. Save time on data entry.
Features.feature10Desc: Create and manage your service/package catalog offered to clients.
Features.feature11Desc: Dark mode available for comfortable use at night or in low-light environments.
Features.feature12Desc: Supports Bahasa Indonesia and English. Switch languages anytime to suit your needs.

Terms.section1Content: By accessing and using Client Desk services, you agree to and are bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use our services.
Terms.section2Content: Client Desk is a web-based client management platform designed for freelance vendors, photographers, videographers, and MUAs. Services include booking management, invoicing, WhatsApp integration, Google Calendar synchronization, and Google Drive storage.
Terms.section3Content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to immediately notify us of any unauthorized use of your account. We are not responsible for any loss arising from unauthorized use of your account.
Terms.section4Content: Subscription fees are charged according to the plan you choose (monthly, quarterly, yearly, or lifetime). Payments made are non-refundable, except within the 7-day guarantee period after the first purchase.
Terms.section5Content: You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with applicable laws. It is prohibited to use the service for illegal activities, spread malware, or disrupt other users' services.
Terms.section6Content: We respect your privacy and manage data in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Please read our Privacy Policy for more information about how we collect, use, and protect your data.
Terms.section7Content: Client Desk is provided "as is" without any warranties. We are not responsible for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.
Terms.section8Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms and conditions at any time. Changes will take effect once published on this page. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.
Terms.section9Content: If you have questions about these terms and conditions, please contact us via Instagram @ryanekoapps.

Privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide when registering an account, including your name, email address, and profile information. We also collect usage data such as activity logs and setting preferences.
Privacy.section2Content: The information we collect is used to provide and improve Client Desk services, process payments, send service-related notifications, and protect user security.
Privacy.section3Content: Client Desk integrates with third-party services such as Google (Calendar, Drive) and WhatsApp. When you use these integrations, necessary data is shared in accordance with each service's respective privacy policies.
Privacy.section4Content: We use encryption and industry-standard security measures to protect your data. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is completely secure.
Privacy.section5Content: Your data is retained for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You can request account and data deletion at any time by contacting us.
Privacy.section6Content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You also have the right to withdraw consent for data use at any time.
Privacy.section7Content: We use cookies to improve user experience, store preferences, and analyze service usage. You can configure your browser to reject cookies.
Privacy.section8Content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Significant changes will be notified via email or in-app notifications.
Privacy.section9Content: For privacy-related questions, contact us via Instagram @ryanekoapps.
